Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
